skill.name: amazon-buy-box-monitor-api-skill
skill.description: Extract Amazon product details, other seller prices, and seller ratings using the BrowserAct API. Provide an ASIN to get buy box ownership, pricing, fulfillment methods, and competitor seller data without managing proxies or CAPTCHAs.
skill.summary: Automated Amazon Buy Box monitoring that extracts product details, competitor pricing, and seller ratings via ASIN using the BrowserAct API.
skill.author: browser-act

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 55 potential issues, but all are false positives when evaluated in context. The skill is a legitimate API client for the BrowserAct service. Network requests target only browseract.com, env var access reads only BROWSERACT_API_KEY for authentication, and the shell commands in SKILL.md are markdown documentation examples only. No obfuscation, data exfiltration, or malicious intent was found. Risk factors are documented transparently.

low_findings.title: API key read from environment variable
low_findings.description: The script reads BROWSERACT_API_KEY from environment variables using os.getenv(). This is standard practice for API-based skills and the key is only used as a Bearer token for authentication with the BrowserAct service. No credential exfiltration was detected.

low_findings.title: Network requests to external API
low_findings.description: The script makes HTTP requests to api.browseract.com to start tasks, poll status, and retrieve results. These are legitimate API calls to the documented BrowserAct service. All URLs are hardcoded configuration constants, not user-controlled.

low_findings.title: Shell command examples in documentation
low_findings.description: SKILL.md contains bash code blocks showing how to invoke the Python script. These are markdown fenced code blocks serving as documentation only. No shell commands are executed from within the markdown file.

content.user_title: Monitor Amazon Buy Box and Seller Data via API
content.value_statement: Amazon seller data is hard to extract due to CAPTCHAs, IP blocks, and anti-scraping measures. This skill uses the BrowserAct API to reliably retrieve buy box ownership, competitor pricing, fulfillment methods, and seller ratings for any ASIN without managing proxies or browser automation.
actual_capabilities: Retrieve buy box owner, price, and currency for any Amazon ASIN
Extract competitor seller names, prices, shipping fees, and ratings
Check fulfillment method (FBA or FBM) and stock availability status
Get seller rating score and feedback count for the main seller
Returns clean structured data without managing proxies or CAPTCHAs
limitations: Requires a valid BrowserAct API key set as BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable
Task execution can take several minutes due to automated browser operations
Only works with Amazon Standard Identification Numbers (ASINs)
Limited to one automatic retry on failure to prevent infinite loops

use_cases.title: Ecommerce seller price monitoring
use_cases.description: An online seller tracks competitor pricing and buy box ownership daily for their top 50 ASINs to adjust pricing strategy.

use_cases.title: Product research for new listings
use_cases.description: A product researcher evaluates potential new products by analyzing current buy box owners, prices, and seller competition for relevant ASINs.

use_cases.title: Competitive analysis dashboard
use_cases.description: A data analyst builds a dashboard to monitor seller ratings, fulfillment methods, and price changes across multiple Amazon marketplaces.
use_cases.target_user: Data analysts and business intelligence teams

prompt_templates.title: Check buy box for a single ASIN
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the amazon-buy-box-monitor-api-skill to look up ASIN B005O2ZU68 on Amazon US and tell me who currently owns the buy box and at what price.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner user querying a single product

prompt_templates.title: Compare seller prices for an ASIN
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the amazon-buy-box-monitor-api-skill to get all other sellers for ASIN B08N5WRWNW on Amazon US. List each seller with their price, shipping fee, and seller rating.

prompt_templates.title: Analyze fulfillment methods
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the amazon-buy-box-monitor-api-skill to check the fulfillment method and availability status for ASIN B07ZPKBL9V on amazon.co.uk. Tell me if the buy box owner uses FBA or FBM.
prompt_templates.scenario: User investigating fulfillment strategy on UK marketplace

prompt_templates.title: Batch multi-marketplace monitor
prompt_templates.prompt: Run the amazon-buy-box-monitor-api-skill for ASIN B09G9D7KR6 on both amazon.com and amazon.de. Compare the buy box prices, currencies, and seller ratings between the two marketplaces.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced user doing cross-marketplace competitive analysis

output_examples.input: Check the buy box for ASIN B005O2ZU68 on Amazon US.
output: The buy box for ASIN B005O2ZU68 is owned by AnkerDirect at $35.99 USD.
Fulfillment method: FBA. Stock status: In Stock.
There are 3 other sellers with prices ranging from $36.99 to $42.50.
The main seller has a 4.8 star rating with 125,430 feedback counts.

output_examples.input: Compare all sellers for ASIN B08N5WRWNW on Amazon.
output: Buy box owner: Samsung at $849.99 USD (FBA, In Stock).
Other sellers: TechDeals at $839.99 + $5.99 shipping (4.2 stars, 892 ratings),
ElectroWorld at $859.99 free shipping (4.5 stars, 3,421 ratings),
Price comparison shows TechDeals has the lowest total price at $845.98.

best_practices: Always verify the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable is set before running the script to avoid authorization errors.
Monitor terminal output for status updates when tasks take longer than expected, as the script logs progress with timestamps.
Use the default marketplace URL unless the target product is on a specific regional Amazon store like amazon.co.uk or amazon.de.
anti_patterns: Do not retry more than once on failure. If the second attempt also fails, report the error to the user instead of looping.
Do not use this skill without a valid ASIN. Generic product names or keywords will not produce results.
Do not assume the task is stuck if the terminal is still outputting status logs. Wait for the final result before retrying.

faq.question: What is a buy box on Amazon?
faq.answer: The buy box is the white box on a product detail page where customers can add items to their cart. Most Amazon sales go through the buy box, so owning it is important for sellers.

faq.question: Do I need a BrowserAct account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a BrowserAct API key. Go to the BrowserAct Console, copy your API key, and set it as the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: Which Amazon marketplaces are supported?
faq.answer: All Amazon marketplaces are supported. Provide the marketplace URL like amazon.com or amazon.co.uk as the second parameter when running the script.

faq.question: Why does the task take several minutes to complete?
faq.answer: The BrowserAct API uses automated browser operations to extract Amazon data. This process handles CAPTCHAs and IP restrictions automatically, which takes time.

faq.question: What data fields are included in the results?
faq.answer: Results include ASIN, product title, buy box owner and price, currency, fulfillment method, availability status, other sellers with prices and ratings, and seller info with rating and feedback count.

faq.question: Can I monitor multiple ASINs at the same time?
faq.answer: You can run multiple tasks sequentially. Each task monitors one ASIN at a time. Run the skill multiple times for different ASINs and compare the results.
